---
title: "Dashboard"
author: "Harrison Gan"
format: html
---

## Dashboard Example

This dashboard shows a simple visualization using the built-in `mpg` dataset in R.

## Dashboard Example

This dashboard shows a simple visualization using the built-in `mpg` dataset in R.

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mpg, aes(x = class)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(
    title = "Count of Vehicles by Class",
    x = "Vehicle Class",
    y = "Count"
  )
```

## Key Insight

- SUVs are the most common vehicle type  
- Compact and midsize cars also appear frequently  
- Larger vehicle classes dominate the dataset
